overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of an armored character traversing a desolate, snow-covered mountain landscape at dusk with an ominous orange-red sky. The character walks past a burning brazier, encounters a wild dog near the coast, and approaches a small wooden settlement by the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain trail with burning brazier

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the snow-covered mountain path toward distant castle ruins

entered.detail: large stone fortress ruins silhouetted against the orange sky on the mountain peak
wooden structure with bright orange flames providing light on the left side of the path
steep snow-covered mountain slope with exposed rock faces
ash-white snow covering the mountain trail
tall evergreen tree standing alone on the right side of the trail

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a wide-open snowy mountain landscape under a stormy orange dusk sky. A burning brazier provides warm light on the left as the character approaches distant castle ruins silhouetted against the horizon.

events.description: wild dog appears on the right side of the path near the coastal cliff
wild dog exits the frame, moving away toward the right

agents.ego_description: walking along the coastal trail toward a wooden settlement, passing a wild dog

notable_agents.action: wild dog standing on snow near the cliff edge, then walking away toward the coast

entered.detail: dark ocean water visible beyond the snow-covered cliff edge
small dark wooden building with glowing windows situated near the coastline

segments.scene_description: The trail opens to reveal a coastal view with dark water on the right. A wild dog appears briefly near the cliff edge as the character approaches a small wooden hut with glowing windows. The distant castle remains visible in the background while the burning brazier falls behind.

events.description: character turns left to navigate around the wooden hut

agents.ego_description: circling around the wooden hut and navigating through the settlement fences

notable_agents.action: figure standing near the hut entrance, partially obscured by shadows

entered.detail: rough wooden fence posts and rails surrounding the settlement area
scattered wooden planks and broken structures covered in snow

segments.scene_description: The character turns left to circle around the wooden hut, moving through a semi-enclosed settlement area with wooden fences and debris. A figure stands near the hut entrance as the coastal water disappears from view behind the structures.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a desolate snowy mountain landscape that gradually transitions into a secluded coastal settlement. It begins with the character walking under a stormy orange dusk sky, passing a burning brazier that casts a warm glow against the backdrop of distant castle ruins. As the trail opens, the scene expands to reveal dark coastal waters on the right and a wild dog near the cliff edge, while the camera approaches a small wooden hut with glowing windows. The perspective then shifts as the character turns left to circle the hut, moving away from the shoreline and into a semi-enclosed area of wooden fences and debris. Finally, the camera closes in on a figure standing near the hut entrance as the open coast disappears behind the structures of the settlement.
